name: German Short Ribs - Crockpot
recipeIngredient: 3 lb to 3-1/2 lb beef short ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the beef short ribs in a mixture of 2 tablespoons flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Melt shortening in a large skillet. Add the ribs and brown them on all sides.
3. Pour off excess fat.
4. In the crockpot, combine the ribs, onions, wine, chili sauce, brown sugar, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, and chili powder.
5. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
6. Turn the heat to High.
7. Thicken the mixture with 2 tablespoons flour mixed with a small amount of water. Cook until slightly thickened or about 10 minutes.
8. Serve over wide egg noodles.
